description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Start registering a 9‑year‑old player for the Spring 2026 Minors division, choose a multi‑month payment plan if the displayed total fee exceeds $150 (otherwise pay in full), and continue until you reach the waiver section.

tasks.instruction: On the schedule, filter to the Minors team labeled Tigers and April 2026 home games, then choose the earliest Monday–Friday game that starts at or after 5:30 PM, open its details, and add it to your saved schedule.

target_names: Tigers (Minors) vs Eagles (Minors) on 2026-04-06 17:30 at Central Park Field 2

tasks.instruction: On the clinics page, filter to Saturday sessions for ages 11–12 costing $40 or less, then select the soonest available batting clinic and begin registration with sample player and guardian info, choosing an appropriate youth jersey size.

tasks.instruction: On the volunteer opportunities page, filter concession stand shifts at Field 2 on Saturday or Sunday afternoons (between 12:00 PM and 4:00 PM), then pick the earliest available 2‑hour shift and complete the signup form with sample contact details.

target_names: Concession stand shift at Central Park Field 2 on Saturday 2026-03-21 from 12:00 to 14:00

tasks.instruction: View the Minors division standings, sort teams by highest winning percentage first, follow the top team, then open that team’s schedule from your My Teams area.
tasks.name: View the Minors division standings, sort teams by highest winning percentage first, follow the top team, then open that team’s schedule from your My Teams area.

tasks.instruction: After viewing the league’s Rainout & Weather Policy section on same‑day game cancellations, use the contact form to submit a weather‑related question about same‑day cancellations under the appropriate topic, including your name and email.

expected_values.name: Taylor Kim
expected_values.message: How late on game day are weather cancellations for Minors division typically decided?

tasks.instruction: In the shop, filter to youth hats priced under $25, sort by lowest price, add the cheapest option in the official league color to your cart with quantity 1, and in the cart choose standard shipping.

tasks.instruction: On the fields list, filter to locations within 10 miles of ZIP code 12345 that have both parking and restrooms, select the closest field, copy its full street address from the directions view, and paste it into the carpool planner notes followed by a short practice meeting point note.

expected_values.carpool_notes_final: 100 Central Park Dr, Springfield, NY 12345 Practice meeting point

tasks.instruction: In the coaches’ drills section, filter to infield throwing drills for ages 8–10, create a new 60‑minute infield practice plan, add the first three matching drills to the plan, and save it.
